title: New in Box!
description: Sometimes, the box is more fun than the toy inside.
body:
![A badge reading "Made for ModFest: Toybox"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/aa6c3c7b64552dc8e6d37c0677bbe46edbe9a4c7/badge/svg/toybox/cozy.svg)

New in Box! is an entrant to ModFest: Toybox all about the boxes collectibles come in, without any of the expense normally associated with them. Or the collectibles. Because hey, sometimes the most fun part about a new toy is the box it comes in.

If you want the skinny, I made a video about this mod:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SIU-kULANrA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

To get started, all you need to do is craft a Box out of paper, glass, and a diamond. 

![The recipe for a Box, laid out with 3 paper on top, a glass block, diamond and paper in the center, and 3 paper on bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb79346b3732ee3b93aac1c00b6a996c5bb75ab5.jpeg)

Once you have a Box, you’re pretty much set! You can either right click on mobs to capture them with it and build out your trophy room, or right click the Box to shrink down and climb inside.

Enjoy your collectibles, and be sure to check out the booth at ModFest: Toybox!

![A collection of multiple cows, chickens, and Zombies in boxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd1e72af2e524178cfe34407f4cf5562668ceaf1.jpeg)

Hey, if you're still here, check out my video on all the other entrants to Toybox:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/93ohfS6KoZQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
